# meok-abci-bridge-mcp

> MEOK ABCI Bridge MCP — read-only Tendermint / Cosmos blockchain query for agents. Built-in registry of 10 mainnets (Cosmos Hub, Osmosis, Celestia, dYdX, Neutron, Injective, Sei, Akash, Stride, Kava) + custom RPC. ABCI 1.0 + ABCI++ vote extensions. HMAC-signed query results. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- list_chains
- abci_info
- abci_query
- get_block
- get_tx
- get_validators
- chain_status
- sign_query_result

## Install
```
pip install meok-abci-bridge-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-abci-bridge-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
